_comment: Expected dependency tree for SCA-5589 regression test. neo4j-graphrag==1.6.0 is the ONLY direct dependency. All others (pypdf, pydantic, fsspec, neo4j, numpy, etc.) must be TRANSITIVE (children). The bogus package 'this-package-does-not-exist' is not resolved and will not appear in the tree.

transitive_dependencies._note: CRITICAL: Must be transitive under neo4j-graphrag. Pre-fix this appeared at top-level as direct.
